user.title: Connect to Frigate
user.description: Select the Frigate instance this integration should use for camera metadata and MQTT review events.

abort.already_configured: Notifications for Frigate is already configured for this instance.
abort.frigate_not_loaded: Frigate integration is not loaded. Add the Frigate integration first.
abort.no_cameras_available: No cameras found in the Frigate instance.

error.camera_not_found: Selected camera not found in Frigate.
error.profile_name_duplicate: A profile with this name and camera selection already exists.
error.notify_target_required: Either a device or a notify service is required.
error.notify_target_exclusive: Select either a device or a notify service, not both.
error.notify_service_required: A notify service is required for this provider.
error.tv_notify_service_invalid: Android TV profiles cannot use mobile_app services.
error.guard_entity_required: A guard entity is required when mode is Custom.
error.time_filter_start_required: Start time is required for custom time filter.
error.time_filter_end_required: End time is required for custom time filter.
error.presence_entities_required: Presence entities are required when mode is Custom.
error.state_entity_required: A state entity is required when mode is Custom.
error.sub_label_overlap: The same identity cannot be in both include and exclude lists.
error.invalid_template: One or more templates contain invalid syntax.

menu_option_descriptions.delivery: URLs, timing, guard, time, presence, state filters
menu_option_descriptions.appearance: Title template, emojis, sub-label overrides, GenAI prefixes

delivery.title: Delivery & filters
delivery.description: Configure shared delivery settings, URLs, and filter entities used by all profiles.

data_description.base_url: Used to build attachment URLs. External URL is usually best for mobile.
data_description.frigate_url: URL for the 'Open Frigate' tap action. For add-on users, select the ingress path. For external Frigate, enter a URL reachable from your phone (e.g. {example_frigate_url}). Internal/local addresses may not work outside your network.

data_description.initial_delay: Wait before sending the first notification. Gives Frigate time to refine snapshots and detect zones.
data_description.silence_duration: How long to suppress notifications after the silence action.
data_description.cooldown_seconds: Minimum gap between notifications per profile per camera. 0 to disable.

data_description.shared_guard_entity: Toggle to globally allow or block notifications. Use a switch, input_boolean, or binary sensor.

data_description.shared_time_filter_mode: "Only during" suppresses outside the window. "Not during" suppresses inside it.

data_description.shared_presence_entities: Notifications are suppressed when any selected entity is home.

data_description.shared_state_entity: Only notify when this entity is in an allowed state.

appearance.title: Appearance & formatting
appearance.description: Configure the title template, emoji settings, custom emoji mappings, and sub-label overrides.

data_description.title_template: Shared title for all profiles. Select a preset or enter a custom Jinja2 template.

data_description.enable_emojis: When disabled, all emoji output is suppressed globally.
data_description.default_emoji: Fallback when the detected object has no emoji mapping.

data_description.emoji_map: Pre-filled with defaults. Edit to add or change emoji for specific object types.

data_description.phase_initial: Emoji prefixed to messages for new detections. Clear to suppress.
data_description.phase_update: Emoji prefixed to messages for detection updates.
data_description.phase_end: Emoji prefixed to messages when a review ends.
data_description.phase_genai: Emoji prefixed to AI-generated summary messages.

data_description.title_genai_prefix_0: Prepended to the title for low-confidence GenAI descriptions. Blank by default.
data_description.title_genai_prefix_1: Prepended to the title for medium-confidence GenAI descriptions.
data_description.title_genai_prefix_2: Prepended to the title for high-confidence GenAI descriptions.

face_overrides.name: Face emoji overrides
face_overrides.description: Emoji only (e.g. 👧). Do not include the name — it is added automatically. Leave blank for no override.

plate_overrides.name: License plate emoji overrides
plate_overrides.description: Emoji only (e.g. 🚗). Do not include the name — it is added automatically. Leave blank for no override.

zone_aliases.title: Zone aliases
zone_aliases.description: Set human-readable names for camera zones. Expand a camera section to edit its zones.

preset.title: Notification preset
preset.description: Choose a preset to pre-fill notification settings, or start from scratch.

data_description.preset: Pre-fills templates and delivery for each phase. Customize in later steps.

basics.title: Profile basics
basics.description: Set the profile name, cameras, provider, and notification target.

data_description.cameras: Select one or more cameras. Multi-camera profiles share filters and templates; zone filtering is unavailable for multi-camera.
data_description.provider: iOS/Android use the Companion app. Mixed is for groups with both. Android TV uses overlay notifications.
data_description.notify_device: Select a device, or leave empty and specify a service below.
data_description.notify_service: e.g. notify.family. TV profiles must use a TV notify service.
data_description.tag: Determines which notification gets replaced on updates. Variables: review_id, camera, detection_id, object.
data_description.group: Groups notifications on iOS. Variables: review_id, camera.

filtering.title: Filtering
filtering.description: Configure which detections trigger notifications for {camera_name}.

data_description.objects: Leave empty for all tracked objects on the selected cameras.
data_description.severity: Frigate classifies reviews as alert or detection. Choose which to notify on.
data_description.required_zones: Leave empty to accept all zones.

data_description.guard_entity: Only used when the global setting is overridden.

data_description.time_filter_mode: Only used when the global setting is overridden.

data_description.presence_entities: Only used when the global setting is overridden.

data_description.state_entity: Only used when the global setting is overridden.
data_description.state_filter_states: Only used when the global setting is overridden.

recognition_config.name: Recognition filter
recognition_config.description: Filter notifications based on known faces and license plates

data_description.recognition_mode: Disabled: no filtering. Only recognized: hold notifications until a known face or plate is confirmed. Exclude specific: suppress further notifications once a selected identity is confirmed.
data_description.include_sub_labels: Active when mode is 'Only recognized'. Only these trigger notifications. Leave empty for any recognized identity.
data_description.exclude_sub_labels: Active when mode is 'Exclude specific'. These are blocked from triggering further updates.

content.title: Content & templates
content.description: Configure message templates, subtitles, and emoji for each notification phase on {camera_name}. Dropdown values are template IDs — see the [template reference]({templates_url}) for what each ID renders to. You can also type custom Jinja2 directly.

data_description.title_template: Override the global title for this profile. Leave blank to use the shared default.

data_description.subtitle_template: Shown as subtitle on iOS, subject on Android. Leave blank for no subtitle.
Shown as subtitle on iOS, subject on Android. Leave blank for no subtitle.
Shown as subtitle on iOS, subject on Android. Leave blank for no subtitle.
Shown as subtitle on iOS, subject on Android. Leave blank for no subtitle.
data_description.title_prefix_enabled: Prepends the global GenAI threat-level prefix to the notification title for this profile.

media_actions.title: Media & actions
media_actions.description: Configure attachments, video, and action buttons for each notification phase on {camera_name}.

data_description.video: HLS streams instantly on iOS. MP4 must fully download before playback.
data_description.use_latest_detection: Use the most recent detection for thumbnails, snapshots, event GIFs, and clips. Does not affect review GIFs.

data_description.video: HLS streams instantly on iOS. MP4 must fully download before playback.
data_description.use_latest_detection: Use the most recent detection for thumbnails, snapshots, event GIFs, and clips. Does not affect review GIFs.

data_description.video: HLS streams instantly on iOS. MP4 must fully download before playback.
data_description.use_latest_detection: Use the most recent detection for thumbnails, snapshots, event GIFs, and clips. Does not affect review GIFs.

data_description.video: HLS streams instantly on iOS. MP4 must fully download before playback.
data_description.use_latest_detection: Use the most recent detection for thumbnails, snapshots, event GIFs, and clips. Does not affect review GIFs.

data_description.initial_custom_actions: Runs automatically after this phase's notification.
data_description.update_custom_actions: Runs automatically after this phase's notification.
data_description.end_custom_actions: Runs automatically after this phase's notification.
data_description.genai_custom_actions: Runs automatically after this phase's notification.

data_description.tap_preset: What opens when you tap the notification.

data_description.on_button_action: Runs when the Custom Action button is pressed.

delivery.title: Delivery & timing
delivery.description: Configure sound, volume, timing, and platform-specific delivery for each notification phase on {camera_name}.

data_description.delay: Seconds to wait before sending this phase.
Seconds to wait before sending this phase.
Seconds to wait before sending this phase.
Seconds to wait before sending this phase.

data_description.silence_duration: Overrides the shared default. Leave blank to inherit.
data_description.cooldown_override: Overrides the shared cooldown. Leave blank to inherit.
data_description.alert_once: Only the first notification plays sound. Later phases are delivered silently regardless of their sound settings. Critical phases always play sound.

menu.title: Edit profile: {profile_name}
menu.description: Select a section to edit for {camera_name}.

menu_option_descriptions.filtering: Objects, zones, guard, time, presence, state
menu_option_descriptions.delivery: Sound, timing, rate limiting, platform options

customize.title: Customize: {profile_name}
customize.description: Your profile is ready to save. Optionally customize specific sections, or save now to use preset defaults.

menu_option_descriptions.filtering: Objects, zones, guard, time, presence, state
menu_option_descriptions.delivery: Sound, timing, rate limiting, platform options

abort.no_cameras_available: No cameras found in the Frigate instance.

profile_not_found.message: Profile {profile_id} not found or not loaded

options.do_not_notify_during: Do not notify during this window

silence_profile.name: Silence profile
silence_profile.description: Temporarily silence notifications for a specific profile.

profile_id.name: Profile ID
profile_id.description: The unique identifier of the notification profile to silence.

duration.name: Duration
duration.description: How long to silence the profile, in minutes. Uses the profile default if omitted.

clear_silence.name: Clear silence
clear_silence.description: Clear the silence timer for a profile, resuming notifications immediately.

profile_id.name: Profile ID
profile_id.description: The unique identifier of the notification profile to un-silence.

broken_camera_binding.title: Profile "{profile_name}" references missing camera
broken_camera_binding.description: The profile **{profile_name}** is configured for camera **{camera}**, which no longer exists in Frigate. Re-add the camera in Frigate, or delete the profile and create a new one with a valid camera.

stale_zone_config.title: Profile "{profile_name}" references missing zones
stale_zone_config.description: The profile **{profile_name}** requires zones **{zones}** which no longer exist in Frigate. Edit the profile to update zone filtering, or re-add the zones in Frigate.
